title: Fluffy Pancakes
description: Soft, airy breakfast pancakes with a golden crust, ready in 20 minutes. Serve with maple syrup, fresh fruit, or a dusting of icing sugar.
steps: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder and salt.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs, then whisk in the milk, melted butter and vanilla extract.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and whisk until just combined — a few small lumps are fine, do not overmix.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly grease it. Pour in a small ladle of batter per pancake.
Cook for 2-3 minutes until bubbles form on the surface, then flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes until golden.
Stack the pancakes and serve warm with your favourite toppings.
footnote: For extra fluffiness, let the batter rest for 10 minutes before cooking and avoid pressing the pancakes with the spatula.
